title: armeria labradorica subsp. sibirica
intro: Armeria labradorica subsp. sibirica, also known as the Siberian armeria or Siberian thrift, is a flowering plant species in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate anxiety. Herbal preparations of Armeria labradorica subsp. sibirica often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
